data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protects data in transit and at rest through encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data in transit and AES for stored data.

data.title: Access Control and Authentication
data.description: Enforces strict authentication and authorization protocols.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes OAuth 2.0 and multi-factor authentication (MFA) mechanisms.

data.title: Security Patch Management
data.description: Regularly updates systems and applications to defend against vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch deployment and management system.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS)
data.description: Monitors and flags suspicious activities in the network.
data.technical_spec: Advanced anomaly detection algorithms and machine learning models employed.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.technical_spec: Traffic analysis tools and network-level defenses to mitigate DDoS attacks.
